# Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` first. This project is an AI-friendly repository for adding collaborative comments to Markdown files.

Default priorities:

1. Preserve Markdown readability and version-control workflows.
2. Keep comment anchors stable across common document edits.
3. Treat comment metadata as auditable project data.
4. Document product, architecture, security, and QA decisions when they change.

Use `squad\agents.yml` for the squad roster and role expectations.
